limpeza.name: Cleaning Companies
limpeza.heroDescription: As an intelligent answering solution for residential and commercial cleaning companies, ClickOne AI combines automated phone answering with professional support available 24 hours a day.
limpeza.problemTitle: Calls come in at any time.
problems: Missed calls while you're on a job
Clients give up if they can't speak to someone
Lost leads due to delayed response
limpeza.solutionTitle: Clean while we handle the calls.
limpeza.solutionDescription: ClickOne's AI Receptionist answers every call professionally and collects essential information through structured questions. By gathering important data upfront — such as property type and size, cleaning frequency needed, and specific services required — the system helps identify and prioritize qualified leads.

testimonials.quote: ClickOne AI transformed our service. We used to miss 60% of calls when we were on jobs. Now we capture 100% of leads.
testimonials.author: Lucia Fernandes

testimonials.quote: Now my team focuses 100% on cleaning. The AI schedules, confirms, and even collects customer feedback automatically.
testimonials.author: Carlos Rodriguez

testimonials.quote: We tripled our recurring customers in 6 months. Automatic follow-up makes all the difference.
testimonials.author: Ana Paula Silva

faqs.question: Can the AI handle specific cleaning requests?
faqs.answer: Yes! Our AI is trained to collect all necessary information, including property type, size, desired frequency, and specific services like window cleaning, deep cleaning, or post-construction cleaning.

faqs.question: How does recurring cleaning scheduling work?
faqs.answer: The AI automatically manages your recurring customer schedule, sending reminders before each service and allowing rescheduling without your manual intervention.

faqs.question: Can the AI provide quotes?
faqs.answer: The AI collects all necessary information and can provide estimates based on your pricing parameters. For custom quotes, it schedules a call with you.

faqs.question: Does it work with WhatsApp and text messages?
faqs.answer: Yes! In addition to phone calls, our AI responds to WhatsApp messages, SMS, and website chat, all integrated into a single platform.

faqs.question: How long does setup take?
faqs.answer: Initial setup takes about 30 minutes. Our implementation team works with you to customize responses and integrate with your existing tools.

faqs.question: Can the AI qualify complex construction projects?
faqs.answer: Yes! The AI collects detailed information such as project type, square footage, estimated budget, desired timeline, and technical specifications before scheduling a site visit.

faqs.question: How does the AI differentiate emergencies from planned projects?
faqs.answer: Our AI asks specific questions to identify urgency. Urgent repairs are prioritized and routed immediately, while larger projects are scheduled for site visits.

faqs.question: Can I receive vendor calls too?
faqs.answer: Yes! The AI identifies vendor calls and can collect information about deliveries, timelines, and quotes, organizing everything for you to review later.

faqs.question: Does the AI work when I'm on the job site?
faqs.answer: Exactly what it was designed for! You can work focused while the AI answers all calls and organizes your visit schedule.

faqs.question: How does proposal follow-up work?
faqs.answer: The AI automatically tracks sent proposals, contacts clients who haven't responded, and schedules closing calls with you.

faqs.question: How does the AI handle summer demand spikes?
faqs.answer: Our AI scales automatically to handle any call volume. It triages emergencies (AC down in heat) from preventive maintenance, ensuring you serve those who need it most first.

faqs.question: Can the AI sell preventive maintenance contracts?
faqs.answer: Yes! When a customer calls for a repair, the AI automatically offers a preventive maintenance plan, explaining benefits and scheduling if the customer accepts.

faqs.question: Does it work for night and weekend emergencies?
faqs.answer: Yes! The AI operates 24/7. For real emergencies (like AC down on a hot day), it contacts you immediately. For other cases, it schedules for the next available time.

faqs.question: Does the AI collect technical equipment information?
faqs.answer: Yes! It asks for brand, model, equipment age, and problem symptoms, allowing you to arrive prepared with the right parts.

faqs.question: How does the AI organize calls by region?
faqs.answer: The AI groups calls by geographic location, optimizing your routes and allowing you to serve more customers per day.
